description: Rewrite 4 fake QuantEdits components from object-tree format to real React JSX with Tailwind CSS: EffectsPanel, ExportDialog, LayerPanel, ToolPanel.
steps: Read apps/quantedits/src/types/index.ts to understand Layer, BlendMode, Effect, AppliedEffect, EffectCategory, etc.
Rewrite apps/quantedits/src/components/EffectsPanel.tsx: Convert to JSX effects browser with applied effects list (toggle/intensity/remove), category tabs, and effects grid. Keep all handler props.
Rewrite apps/quantedits/src/components/ExportDialog.tsx: Convert to JSX export dialog/modal component.

Rewrite apps/quantedits/src/components/LayerPanel.tsx: Convert to JSX layer management panel with blend mode select, opacity slider, layer list (visibility/lock/thumbnail/name), and action buttons (new/duplicate/delete).
Rewrite apps/quantedits/src/components/ToolPanel.tsx: Convert to JSX tool selection panel.
Verify: Run `pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/quantedits` passes with 0 errors.
acceptance_criteria: All 4 QuantEdits files return JSX (not object trees)
grep -n "type: 'div'" across all 4 files returns 0 matches
All files maintain their original Props interfaces
All files use Tailwind CSS classes
Export structure preserved (named export + default export)
